summary: P0-B AP Unification testing completed successfully. All backend and frontend tests passed. PO payment endpoint correctly blocked (HTTP 400), 'Hutang Supplier (AP)' menu removed from both admin and manager sidebars, PO detail panel shows 'Status Penagihan (Vendor Bill)' section without payment button, Vendor Bill endpoints (SSOT) working, and Purchase Approval flow (P1-C) regression tests passed.

warnings.issue: PO objects missing billed_total/unbilled_total fields in list response
warnings.impact: Fields may be null/undefined if no vendor bills exist yet - this is expected behavior

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders/po_009/pay returns HTTP 400 with correct error message directing to Vendor Bill
Backend: P0-A deletion-safe document numbering working (PO-00012 created correctly)
Backend: P1-C multi-level approval flow working (PO-00010, PO-00011 approved through L1 Manager -> L2 Direksi)
Backend: Segregation of Duties (SoD) working - creator cannot approve own PO
Frontend Admin: 'Hutang Supplier (AP)' menu item NOT found in PEMBELIAN sidebar group (correctly removed)
Frontend Admin: 'Tagihan Supplier' menu item exists in PEMBELIAN sidebar (SSOT)
Frontend Admin: PO detail panel shows 'Status Penagihan (Vendor Bill)' section with unbilled amount
Frontend Admin: 'Bayar PO' button NOT found in PO detail panel (correctly removed)
Frontend Admin: Payment form NOT found (correctly removed)
Frontend Admin: Purchase Approval view loads and shows PO-00010 in approved list with multi-level approval chain stepper
Frontend Manager: 'Hutang Supplier (AP)' menu item NOT found in PEMBELIAN sidebar (correctly removed)
Frontend Manager: 'Tagihan Supplier' menu item exists in PEMBELIAN sidebar
Frontend Manager: Purchase Approval view accessible and working
Frontend Manager: Dashboard loads without errors

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all critical P0-B and P1-C regression tests passed)
